title: TransIndia Logistics is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: TransIndia Logistics is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the TransIndia Logistics family as a Warehouse Manager in Jabalpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About TransIndia Logistics:
TransIndia Logistics is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TransIndia Logistics!
